{"id":"project-LICHEN-66df","title":"LoopbackRadio uses unwrap() on mutex that could panic","description":"File: rust/lichen-hal/src/loopback.rs:76, 84, 94

The LoopbackRadio implementation uses .unwrap() on mutex locks:
- Line 76: has_pending() - rx_chan.lock().unwrap()
- Line 84: transmit() - tx_chan.lock().unwrap()  
- Line 94: receive() - rx_chan.lock().unwrap()

If another thread panics while holding one of these locks, the mutex becomes poisoned. Subsequent lock attempts will panic, causing cascading failures in tests.

While this is common Rust practice, for test infrastructure it can make debugging harder - a single test panic can cause unrelated tests to fail with confusing mutex poison errors.

Fix: Consider using .lock().unwrap_or_else() with proper error handling, or documenting that LoopbackRadio is not panic-safe.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:32:24.100886Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:32:24.10092Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-66df","title":"LoopbackRadio uses unwrap() on mutex that could panic","description":"File: rust/lichen-hal/src/loopback.rs:76, 84, 94

The LoopbackRadio implementation uses .unwrap() on mutex locks:
- Line 76: has_pending() - rx_chan.lock().unwrap()
- Line 84: transmit() - tx_chan.lock().unwrap()  
- Line 94: receive() - rx_chan.lock().unwrap()

If another thread panics while holding one of these locks, the mutex becomes poisoned. Subsequent lock attempts will panic, causing cascading failures in tests.

While this is common Rust practice, for test infrastructure it can make debugging harder - a single test panic can cause unrelated tests to fail with confusing mutex poison errors.

Fix: Consider using .lock().unwrap_or_else() with proper error handling, or documenting that LoopbackRadio is not panic-safe.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:32:24.100886Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:23:20.287987208Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:23:20.287987208Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:28:20.287987208Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:23:20.287987208Z"}
